text.message: I'll just port green I'm in last
You have 2 nones and army pacing
Whoever has monos will rip through it here tbh
I haven't rolled 1 9 so I'm just doing nothing
he just dropped a second city and you still table talking?
blue only needs road and settle
You focused on the wrong plow green...
Crazy to not start connecting yourself...
Who are you expecting to help green?
I honestly thought you'd focus on connecting green to stop blue
I was never a threat here my production is awful
Now I can't even fight blues road either...
Most people just hold their hands up green and go yeh my bad that was a stinker
I'll take that as a sorry
